channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 35.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘I am not going to walk away’, says Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: ‘I am not going to walk away’, says Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform in Makerfield to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows
item.description: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform in Makerfield to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham left no one in doubt – he intends to be PM
item.description: Burnham left no one in doubt – he intends to be PM

item.title: i Politics: Cabinet ministers privately pushing to rejoin the EU
item.description: Cabinet ministers privately pushing to rejoin the EU

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This is the wages of Starmer Labour's utter cynicism about the public IMO.
There are so many instances (tax, the EU, etc) where they'd be way more popular if they just gave it to people straight, but they remain com...
item.description:
This is the wages of Starmer Labour's utter cynicism about the public IMO.
There are so many instances (tax, the EU, etc) where they'd be way more popular if they just gave it to people straight, but they remain com...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reeves poised to cancel planned fuel duty rise to help with cost of living
item.description: Reeves poised to cancel planned fuel duty rise to help with cost of living

item.title: BBC Politics: PM insists he will not walk away as Burnham promises to change Labour
item.description: PM insists he will not walk away as Burnham promises to change Labour

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Stephen it's not reasonable to expect the Prime Minister to have any kind of fixed belief or direction.
item.description: Stephen it's not reasonable to expect the Prime Minister to have any kind of fixed belief or direction.

item.title: ITVX: Starmer 'not going to walk away' as Burnham sets out by-election pitch - ITVX
item.description: Starmer 'not going to walk away' as Burnham sets out by-election pitch - ITVX

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I remember Keir Starmer saying we should be at the “heart of Europe” as if it were only last week.
item.description: I remember Keir Starmer saying we should be at the “heart of Europe” as if it were only last week.
